evals.prompt: The DevOps work is done: a new GitHub Actions release workflow was just added at .github/workflows/release.yml. Independently verify the implementation before we merge and give me a verdict.
evals.expected_output: Loads the senior-devops-engineer validation chain for GitHub Actions, runs or names actionlint plus permissions/pinning/artifact-promotion checks, inspects the diff scope, and reports a structured PASS/FAIL verdict with per-check results and unverified gaps without editing the workflow.
assertions: The verification uses the GitHub Actions deterministic chain (actionlint, minimal permissions, SHA pinning, artifact promotion) and reports each check with its actual or pending status
The response ends in a structured verdict with findings and unverified gaps, and does not modify or re-implement the workflow itself

evals.prompt: A cache-invalidation bug fix in src/cache.ts was just declared done, with tests supposedly added. Run an independent verification pass and tell me whether I can trust it.
evals.expected_output: Applies the senior-developer verification checklist: build/typecheck, targeted tests, demands failing-before/passing-after regression evidence for the specific bug, checks diff scope for unrelated edits, and returns a verdict with evidence and residual risks.
assertions: The verification requires evidence that a regression test fails before the fix and passes after, not merely that the suite is green
The report separates deterministic results, findings, and unverified gaps, and proposes fixes as findings instead of applying them

evals.prompt: The inventory drag-and-drop feature for our Godot 4 project was implemented earlier in this session. The engine binary is available. Verify the implementation independently and report.
evals.expected_output: Loads the godot-game-creation-engineer verification checklist, runs headless parse and scene-load checks on the changed scripts and scenes, exercises the test scene or suite when present, and reports an evidence-backed verdict without expanding scope.
assertions: Headless parse or scene-integrity checks are run (or named as blocked with the reason) for the changed scripts and scenes
The verdict cites observed behavior or explicitly states that behavioral verification needs a display or manual test, rather than inferring success

evals.prompt: Design the test strategy and coverage plan for our new billing service before we start building it.
evals.expected_output: Should route to testing-engineer: this is test design ahead of implementation, not independent verification of completed work.

evals.prompt: Review this pull request for code quality and suggest refactors and simplifications.
evals.expected_output: Should route to senior-developer: the request is qualitative code review and refactoring advice, not a verdict on whether a completed implementation meets its verification checklist.

evals.prompt: The new onboarding screen is implemented; critique the visual design and interaction flow.
evals.expected_output: Should route to design-reviewer (with visual-qa for browser evidence): UI critique has dedicated owners; implementation-verifier hands UI work to them.
